overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a multi-lane road onto a sidewalk, passing a yellow sports car and walking alongside a red construction wall with large billboards, eventually reaching a commercial storefront area with the Delamain building.

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of a multi-lane city road, approaching a parked yellow sports car

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car parked on the roadside

entered.detail: futuristic yellow sports car parked on the side of the road
tall red construction barrier running along the sidewalk
large digital billboard displaying Nightcorp corporate logo
tall glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the background
blue metal street light pole along the road

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a multi-lane asphalt road in a futuristic city. A yellow sports car is parked on the right, with a long red construction wall behind it featuring large digital billboards. Futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background under a clear blue sky.

events.description: camera moves from asphalt road onto concrete sidewalk
camera turns right to align with sidewalk direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a red construction wall, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt standing near lamppost looking at a handheld device
person in dark jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having moved onto the concrete sidewalk, the camera walks alongside a red construction wall covered in changing digital billboards. A pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt stands near a lamppost looking at a device, while another pedestrian in dark clothing walks ahead in the same direction. Traffic continues to flow on the left.

events.description: exiting construction wall area into commercial storefront zone with Delamain building

agents.ego_description: walking past the Delamain storefront and approaching individuals seated on benches

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on metal benches in front of the Delamain building

entered.detail: dark building facade with Delamain signage and green awning
metal benches in front of the storefront where people are seated

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial area as the red construction wall ends. The Delamain storefront appears on the right with its distinctive signage and green awning. Two individuals sit on metal benches in front of the building as the camera approaches, marking the end of the construction zone and entry into a more developed commercial block.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide urban roadway into a developed commercial storefront area. It begins on a multi-lane asphalt road beside a parked yellow sports car, with futuristic skyscrapers rising under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves onto the concrete sidewalk, it glides alongside a long red construction wall adorned with shifting digital billboards, passing a pedestrian in a yellow plaid shirt and another figure walking ahead. The scene then opens up as the construction wall ends, shifting the environment toward a commercial block. Finally, the camera approaches the Delamain storefront with its distinctive green awning and signage, passing two individuals seated on metal benches.
